durable_improvement: Added an account-scoped Cloudflare Pages project discovery contract that derives the canonical pages.dev hostname from the Cloudflare API instead of assuming it from repository configuration.

verification.source_review: The module requires exact project-name equality, rejects malformed and ambiguous responses, derives a canonical HTTPS Pages URL, and omits credentials and account identifiers from its output.
verification.workflow_status: no successful GitHub Actions execution observed at record creation

epistemic_limit: A verified Pages project and hostname establish infrastructure identity only. They do not prove served content, deployment commit, medical validity, diagnosis, treatment efficacy, or scientific truth.
falsification_route: Run the workflow with the cloudflare-research environment. Reject this improvement as operationally complete unless the artifact reports project_verified for mirror-cartographer-research and a canonical .pages.dev URL.
